---
title: "ISSS608-Visual Analytics & Application"
---

**Hi, I'm Kartikey Thakar** 👋
**Welcome to my Visual Analytics and Application course home page, where data gets dressed up and actually makes sense. I'm a student at SMU figuring out how to turn numbers into stories**

## What You'll Find Here

| Section | What's Inside |
|---|---|
| 🖐️ **Hands-on Exercises** | In-class exercises working through core VA concepts |
| 📝 **Take-home Exercises** | Graded assignments where I go deeper independently |

---
